display.purpose: Page subject (searched company name) in the job header. One per view. Fixed 1.875rem (text-3xl), not fluid.

title.purpose: Largest section headings, brand-candidate prompt, recent-jobs label. Result-group headers step down to 1rem semibold; count figures step up to 1.5rem.

body.purpose: Reading copy and Result titles. Cap prose at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Buttons, field labels, filter tabs. Short uppercase section labels (Recent jobs, Sentiment) use this with tracking-wide.

mono.purpose: Machine data only: source domains, dates, counts, search window. Shipped as the .mono class in Text Muted.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Forward standard for dropdowns, popovers, command menus. Not yet instantiated; the shipped UI is flat everywhere.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Forward standard for dialogs above a dimmed backdrop. Not yet instantiated.

motion.name: gauge-reveal
motion.purpose: Sentiment gauge segment widths animate on mount; instant under prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: status-pulse
motion.purpose: Running status chip opacity pulse (50% { opacity: 0.55 }); suppressed under prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: focus-ring
motion.purpose: Global :focus-visible ring on every interactive element.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Split layout threshold: below lg the search rail + results pane stack into one column; at/above lg they sit side-by-side (320px rail + 1fr pane).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single ink-filled primary action (e.g. "Start search"). Colour is reserved for the accent, so the loudest action is ink, not blue.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #292a2a; color: #fdfdfc; font-family: var(--font-sans, "FK Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #3f3e3e; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #46bbff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary / Selection Button
components.description: The brand-candidate picker: a full-width, left-aligned card-button. The real secondary affordance, not a tinted pill. Optional brand icon, name, then the domain in mono.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { width: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; text-align: left; background: #fcfaf9; color: #292a2a; font-family: var(--font-sans, "FK Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #ebe0d8; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f3ece7; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #46bbff; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-secondary__icon { border-radius: 4px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-btn-secondary__name { font-weight: 500; } .ds-btn-secondary__domain { font-family: var(--font-mono, ui-monospace, monospace); font-size: 0.8125rem; color: #5c5959; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard labelled text/url field. The search front door is two of these (company name + homepage URL) in the rail.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 4px; font-family: var(--font-sans, "FK Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #292a2a; } .ds-input { background: #fdfdfc; color: #292a2a; font: inherit; font-weight: 400; font-size: 1rem; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d8cbc0; border-radius: 8px; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6f6b6b; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #46bbff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Result Row
components.description: The densest reusable surface: one piece of coverage. Title link (opens in a new tab) over a mono meta line of source domain + date + optional low-confidence flag. Flat, lifted by tone + border only.
components.html:
• Acme raises $40M Series B to expand European operations ↗(opens in a new tab)
    techcrunch.com · 2026-04-12 · low confidence
components.css: .ds-result-row { list-style: none; background: #fcfaf9; border: 1px solid #ebe0d8; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; } .ds-result-row__title { display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; font-family: var(--font-sans, "FK Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; color: #292a2a; text-decoration: none; } .ds-result-row__title:hover { color: #1071b3; } .ds-result-row__title:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #46bbff; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-result-row__meta { font-family: var(--font-mono, ui-monospace, monospace); font-size: 0.8125rem; color: #5c5959; margin-top: 4px; } .ds-result-row__flag { color: #f0be0a; } .ds-sr-only { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding: 0; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0,0,0,0); white-space: nowrap; border: 0; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Live job status (<bb-job-status>). Pill with state carried by colour AND label. done → green surface; warnings/failed → coral surface; running → press-blue text with a slow pulse. role=status / aria-live announce transitions.
components.html: Done Searching
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: var(--font-sans, "FK Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; background: #f3ece7; color: #292a2a; border: 1px solid #ebe0d8; } .ds-status--done { background: #bbf5d7; } .ds-status--alert { background: #fec2c8; } .ds-status--running { color: #1071b3; animation: ds-pulse 1.4s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 50% { opacity: 0.55; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-status--running { animation: none; } }

components.name: Filter Tabs
components.description: Content-type filter tablist (<bb-result-filter>). Ghost buttons; active tab takes press-blue text + border. Roving tabindex + arrow keys; client-side, instant, degrades to all-visible without JS.
components.css: .ds-filter { display: block; } .ds-filter__tab { font-family: var(--font-sans, "FK Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 4px 10px; margin-right: 4px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid transparent; background: transparent; color: #5c5959; cursor: pointer; } .ds-filter__tab:hover { background: #f3ece7; } .ds-filter__tab--active { color: #1071b3; border-color: #1a8cd6; } .ds-filter__tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #46bbff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Sentiment Gauge
components.description: Stacked positive/neutral/negative bar (<bb-sentiment-gauge>). Colour is never the sole carrier: a labelled legend with dot + count sits below, and the bar exposes role=img with a full aria-label. Widths animate on mount; instant under reduced motion.
components.html: Positive 7Neutral 4Negative 1
components.css: .ds-gauge__bar { display: flex; height: 0.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #ebe0d8; background: #f7f3ef; } .ds-gauge__seg { height: 100%; transition: width 0.3s ease-out; } .ds-gauge__seg--pos { background: #25b566; } .ds-gauge__seg--neu { background: #6f6b6b; } .ds-gauge__seg--neg { background: #e85a68; } .ds-gauge__labels { display: flex; gap: 1rem; margin-top: 0.5rem; font-family: var(--font-sans, "FK Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.8125rem; color: #5c5959; } .ds-gauge__dot { display: inline-block; width: 0.6rem; height: 0.6rem; border-radius: 9999px; margin-right: 0.35rem; vertical-align: middle; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-gauge__seg { transition: none; } }

components.name: Count Triad
components.description: Three plain figures in the job header (returned / excluded / classified). Deliberately NOT a hero-metric block: no accent colour, no deltas, no card. Three honest counts, evenly spaced.
components.css: .ds-triad { display: flex; gap: 32px; } .ds-triad__num { font-family: var(--font-sans, "FK Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: #292a2a; } .ds-triad__label { font-family: var(--font-mono, ui-monospace, monospace); font-size: 0.8125rem; color: #5c5959; }

components.name: Warning Banner
components.description: Full-width coral-surface block for a warning or error. Colour + glyph + message, never colour alone. role=status for live announcement.
components.html: ⚠ Brand resolution skipped — no BrandFetch key; using the URL you provided.
components.css: .ds-banner { background: #fec2c8; color: #292a2a; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: var(--font-sans, "FK Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: Breakbeat is where a PR pro sits down, names a company, and watches its public footprint assemble itself — the modern descendant of the press-clipping desk where comms teams once pinned coverage to a board. The system inherits the Drumbeat platform's identity wholesale: warm newsprint paper, ink charcoal type, and a single press-room sans (FK Grotesk). The aesthetic is editorial and calm, not the cold blue-gray of generic SaaS. This is a product surface, design serves the task: the shipped layout is a two-column split (a fixed 320px search rail on warm Newsprint Muted, then the results pane on Page White) that collapses to a single column below lg. Color is restrained — the warm neutral ramp carries the surface, ink charcoal carries text and the one primary action, and a single press blue accent marks links, focus, and the live status signal. It explicitly rejects the generic SaaS template, the cluttered enterprise dashboard, and heavy marketing flourish.
keyCharacteristics: Warm newsprint paper foundation with ink-charcoal type, editorial not corporate.
One press-blue accent, used sparingly for action, focus, and live signals.
A single humanist sans (FK Grotesk) carrying all hierarchy through weight and a fixed type scale.
Flat surfaces, hairline borders, fast functional motion (no choreography).
Results-first: the split layout puts the assembled readout front and centre; chrome recedes to the rail.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Press blue is the only chromatic accent in the core UI; it lives on ≤10% of any screen. Its scarcity is what makes "this is a link / this is the active filter / this is live" legible. Semantic green, coral, and gold are signals, not accents.

rules.name: The Warm-On-Purpose Rule
rules.body: The newsprint background is a committed brand choice, not the AI warm-cream reflex. Never flatten it to a cool gray, and never add a second warm-neutral family. The warmth is the brand; the variation is tonal, not hue-shifted.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: FK Grotesk does all the work. No second display or body face. Mono appears only on machine data (domains, dates, counts), never on prose.

rules.name: The Short-Label Rule
rules.body: Uppercase is reserved for genuine short section labels of ≤4 words (Recent jobs, Sentiment), set in Label type with tracking-wide. Never on sentences, never as a decorative eyebrow above every section.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest (box-shadow: none). A shadow means "this floats above the page." If an element isn't a true overlay, it gets a border and a tonal shift, not a shadow.

dos: Do keep the Newsprint (#efe8e3) body background and Ink (#292a2a) type as the foundation; this warm paper is the committed Drumbeat brand.
Do make the primary action Ink Charcoal, not a colored button. Save Press Blue for links, focus, the active filter, and live signals.
Do keep Press Blue to ≤10% of any screen (The One Accent Rule).
Do attach a source (Mono domain + date) to every Result; show "date unknown" rather than hiding a missing date.
Do build depth from tonal layering + 1px border-hair; ship surfaces flat and reserve shadows for true overlays only.
Do carry all type hierarchy with FK Grotesk weight + the fixed rem scale; use Mono only for machine data.
Do keep motion functional and brief: gauge reveal 0.3s ease-out, running chip a slow pulse, both with a prefers-reduced-motion fallback.
Do pair every status colour (green / coral / gold) with a glyph, label, or count, and give live regions role=status / aria-live.
donts: Don't ship the generic SaaS template: no purple gradient, no hero-metric block, no endless identical icon-heading-text card grids. The count triad stays three plain numbers.
Don't drift toward the cluttered enterprise dashboard: no dense gray everything-at-once legacy UI.
Don't add heavy marketing flourish: no scroll-jacking, oversized hero imagery, or decorative animation that delays the work.
Don't flatten the warm newsprint to a cool gray, or introduce a second warm-neutral family.
Don't use a border-left/border-right colored stripe (>1px) as an accent; warnings use a full Coral Surface fill, not a stripe.
Don't use a clamp/fluid heading scale in the app; this is a product surface on a fixed rem scale.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism as default decoration, or a tracked all-caps eyebrow above every section.
Don't nest cards, or let muted metadata text drop below 4.5:1 contrast on its background.
